description: Controlled profile metrics CareerPilot must extract before ranking jobs.

fields.label: Target roles
fields.description: Roles the candidate is actively targeting, including role families and specializations.

fields.label: Years of experience
fields.description: Approximate full-time equivalent professional experience relevant to the target roles.

fields.label: Core skills
fields.description: Skills that are central evidence for matching jobs.

fields.label: Language level
fields.description: Observed language abilities, especially German and English, including evidence and uncertainty.

fields.label: Visa / Blue Card needs
fields.description: Work authorization, sponsorship, relocation, EU Blue Card, or salary-threshold needs.

fields.label: Location flexibility
fields.description: Preferred, acceptable, and rejected locations plus remote or hybrid flexibility.

fields.label: Seniority target
fields.description: Best-fit seniority level and roles that are too junior or too senior.

fields.label: Hard constraints
fields.description: Non-negotiable requirements that should cap or reject jobs.

fields.label: Soft preferences
fields.description: Preferences that should influence ranking but should not automatically reject jobs.

fields.label: Uncertainty fields
fields.description: Profile dimensions where the evidence is missing, conflicting, or inferred weakly.
